successfully-joined: You have successfully joined the workspace.
temperature-help: Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
context-compression-help: Choose the compression preset used to rewrite older context when the conversation grows.
context-compression-detail-conservative: Compacts older tool outputs and strips attachments from past turns, while keeping the current turn intact.
context-compression-detail-aggressive: Does the same as conservative, and also strips attachments from the current turn to save more space.
context-compression-trigger-help: Compression is applied only when the uncompressed context exceeds this token count. Leave empty to always compress.
no-effective-draft-changes: This draft has no changes compared to the published version.
nothing-to-publish: There are no changes to publish.
